title: Rolling up subitem timelines
excerpt: How do I get the subitems timelines to roll up to its parent?  Similar to MS Project.  Is this possible?  Thanks!  And… when I change a subitem timeline, it automatically updates its parent, too.

posts.author: lii9 (Lisa)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I get the subitems timelines to roll up to its parent? Similar to MS Project. Is this possible? Thanks! And… when I change a subitem timeline, it automatically updates its parent, too.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lii9 and welcome to the community!

To have all the subitems of an item roll up to its parent you can simply go into the options of the subitem column you wish to show on the parent and select “Show Summary on Parent Item”

image865×270 24.6 KB

Do this for any column you wish and you will see a summarized version of all subitems on the parent (including timelines):

image886×264 20.7 KB

Hope this helps!

Thanks
Mark

Green Llamas

posts.author: lii9 (Lisa)
posts.cookedHtml: You’re my hero, Mark. It was right there… thank you. Still playing with it!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
My pleasure! If you need any further assistance let me know!

Thanks,
Mark
